Added_Other.mechanism: Enables a new command line interface feature for Roblox developers.
Added_Other.purpose: Streamlines the development process, making it easier for developers to manage their projects.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlagRepoGitHashDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores the current Git hash of the repository as a dynamic string.
Changed_Other.purpose: Allows developers to track changes and versions of the game more effectively.

Changed_Other.name: DFStringFlipTimeStampDynamicString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Allows dynamic strings to include timestamps that can flip based on conditions.
Changed_Other.purpose: Enables more flexible and context-aware text displays in the game.

Changed_Other.name: FStringFlagRepoGitHashFastString
Changed_Other.mechanism: Stores a fast string representation of the Git hash for quick access.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance by reducing load times for version information.

Changed_Other.mechanism: Optimizes string handling for timestamps.
Changed_Other.purpose: Improves performance when displaying time-related information.
